findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` is defined only in `dev.yml` (profiles: ["dev"]). Per Taskfile.yml and infra/deploy/strategy.sh, dev composes base.yml + observability.yml + dev.yml, while staging/prod compose base.yml + <env>.yml + services.yml + observability.yml — they never include dev.yml. So `widgetizer` reaches dev only and is silently absent from staging/prod, the costly twice-shipped parity defect. It is a genuine workload service (its own image plus WIDGETIZER_DB_URL against postgres), not local-developer-experience tooling (Traefik/mailcatcher/DB-admin-UI), so it should reach prod.
findings.suggestion: Move the `widgetizer` service to a prod-reaching overlay: `base.yml` (shared by all environments) or `services.yml` (the battery data-store/worker home merged into staging/prod). If it is intentionally dev-only, record that decision in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently omitted from staging/prod.
